chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P No.D-266 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 14.05.2025 Mr. Mehfooz Ali advocate a/w petitioners Mr. Dhani Bux Mari Assistant P.G a/w IO Inspector Abdul Razzak <>*<> Learned counsel for the petitioners submits that being sui-juris petitioner No.1 has contracted free will marriage with petitioner No.2 and being annoyed by such ceremonial marriage, her cousin /respondent No.6 has lodged a false FIR bearing Crime No.48 of 2025 at P.S Hali Road under Sections 365-B and 34 PPC. Mr. Muhammad Muneer advocate files power on behalf of the respondent No.6 and submits that petitioner No.1 is minor, as such she is not permitted by the law to contract marriage. Investigation Officer of above crime has recorded the statement of petitioner No.1, wherein she has categorically stated that she being sui juris has contracted free will marriage with petitioner No.2 and no one has abducted her. Investigation Officer submits that based on the statement of petitioner No.1 he will file his report under Section 173 Cr.P.C before the concerned Magistrate for disposal of the case in accordance with law. Counsel for the petitioners expressed satisfaction and seeks disposal of the petition. In view of the above, instant petition is disposed of with directions to Investigation Officer to file his report before the learned Magistrate concerned keeping in view of the statement of petitioner No.1/alleged abducted recorded under Section 161 Cr.P.C for disposal of the case in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE *Sajjad*
